text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both posting modest gains despite extreme fear sentiment, suggesting selective accumulation rather than panic selling. Bitcoin dominance at 56.7% reflects capital consolidating into the largest asset, while altcoins like Solana show stronger momentum, indicating some risk appetite returning from the lows. The 24-hour volume of $66B is moderate, consistent with cautious positioning in a fearful market that has shifted 12 points toward greed over the past week.
